metadata.dc:title: This dataset compiles global evidence on psychological factors that drive economic decision-making, spanning behavioral economics, cognitive psychology, and neuroeconomics research published from 1990 to 2025. It covers four core psychological variab
metadata.dc:creator: Juan Moisés de la Serna Tuya
Juan Moisés de la Serna Tuya
metadata.dc:description: This dataset compiles global evidence on psychological factors that drive economic decision-making, spanning behavioral economics, cognitive psychology, and neuroeconomics research published from 1990 to 2025. It covers four core psychological variab
metadata.dc:subject: behavioral-economics, cc0, cognitive-biases, cognitive-heuristics, confirmation-bias, dataset, decision-making, open-data, risk-aversion, temporal-discounting, zenodo
